case_title: LUIS CARRILLO VS. SUSAN THERESA ESPOSITO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY CARRILLO, LUIS ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2018 BY PRO TEM BRUCE LUBARSKY. 506 PLAINTIFF LUIS CARRILLO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY #301386. DEFENDANT SUSAN ESPOSITO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CARRILLO, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WOLLER, JOHN S. SUBSTITUTED FOR AS ATTORNEY FOR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRILLO, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA $4,974.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,049.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2018 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELLIOTT MYLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (525)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CARRILLO, LUIS RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA $2,487.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,562.00, PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT WAS 50% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA MAILED TO RESPONDENT CARRILLO, LUIS
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR SEP-06-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF LUIS CARRILLO, IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI ENRIQUEZ #300781.
JOHN S. WOLLER, ESQ., FOR APPELLANT/DEFENDANT SUSAN THERESA ESPOSITO WHO IS PRESENT.

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. ALL PARTIES ARE SWORN.

LUIS CARRILLO, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, TESTIFIES ON HIS OWN BEHALF. THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:
EXHIBIT 1 - BINDER CLIPPED WRITTEN DOCUMENTS IN SPANISH LANGUAGE

APPELLANT/DEFENDANT SUSAN THERESA ESPOSITO TESTIFIES ON THEIR OWN BEHALF. THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:
EXHIBIT A - THREE PICTURES OF CAR COLOR PHOTOS
EXHIBIT B - STAPLED DOCUMENTS PERTAINING TO COMMUNICATION FROM INSURANCE CARRIER AND BLACK AND WHITE PHOTOS OF CARS

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

JPT ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK G. FELICIANO, NOT REPORTED (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Judgment Entered
